body:
This PR adds `Oceananigans.Diagnostics.WindowedTimeAverage` for computing the average of a quantity or 'kernel' over a specified time window. The design of `WindowedTimeAverage` is discussed extensively on #501 . 

This PR only implements the basic functionality needed to compute `WindowedTimeAverage`. A streamlined user interface through `JLD2OutputWriter` and `NetCDFOutputWriter` will be implemented in a future PR.

Todo:

- [x] tests

Resolves #501
title: WindowedTimeAverage
